## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Sydney's background and potential role at GrowthX, a rapidly growing AI-powered content marketing company.](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is closing a $12M Series A round, scaling rapidly with 35 current clients and aiming for 100-120 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Company uses AI+expert approach, building proprietary workflows and runtime layer for efficient, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Marcel offered Sydney a position on the spot, emphasizing urgent hiring needs and Sydney's relevant experience](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Sydney expressed interest, citing potential for growth and learning in the AI-driven content industry](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

## Topics

### Sydney's Background

  - [Previously worked at Notion, running affiliate/ambassador programs, blog, SEO, and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Drove 10% of signups through her channels at Notion](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Currently at Sam Rush, initially as content coordinator, now in editing role](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Connected with Sam Rush via Twitter/LinkedIn outreach from Kyle Myers](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Founded by Marcel (ex-Scales, ServiceNow, HashiCorp) and Daniel (ex-Canopy CTO, IFTTT product/engineering lead)](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Addressing pain points: expensive agencies, scaling issues, AI tool complexity, team bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - Average deal size \>$150k/year, most deals closing in \<30 days
  - [Started with editorial content, refresh, and programmatic SEO; expanding into distribution and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### GrowthX Technology

  - [Built proprietary runtime layer for AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Workflows represented in code, allowing for easy iteration and scaling](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [System can handle thousands of runs, significantly reducing costs (95% reduction) and increasing speed](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Combines AI automation with human expertise throughout the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### Growth and Hiring Plans

  - [Raising $12M Series A (closing imminently)](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Hiring 25 engineers immediately](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Aiming to scale from 35 to 100-120 clients by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Building capacity now to handle growth and improve workflows](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Offer and Next Steps

  - [Marcel offered Sydney a position on the spot, citing urgent hiring needs](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Proposed start date of March 10th (possibly March 6th)](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Offer to include competitive salary within/above Sydney's expected range](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Upcoming bonus/incentive structure to be implemented post-funding](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send official offer letter to Sydney](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Sydney to confirm preferred start date (March 10th or possibly earlier)](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with Kyle regarding potential March 6th start date](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Sydney to review offer and ask any additional questions to Marcel or Bridget (new Chief of Staff)](https://fathom.video/share/FtFS7rvK6CVnsGUuSF6rCTRF6cxnrXd2?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
